data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY (Due to significant missing data)
REASON: Home team PPG (2.6) is substantially higher than away (0.33), aligning with bookmaker odds (1.55 for Home Win). However, away team xG (1.67) is higher than home (1.51), conflicting with performance metrics. Critical odds for O2.5/BTTS, model predictions, standings, and H2H are missing.
CONCLUSION: Home Win
